description: List of valuable items in Judaeo-Arabic. Headed "thabat mā fīhā." Items include: a maqṭāʿ cloth of fine mulḥam; a cushion; two sewn thawbs; a mayzar cover and a mayzar cover of wool; an ebony inkpot; a tablecover (sufra); a knife; and a pair of wax candle lamps.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בMTA.
